content:
Implementation Roadmap



Phase 1: Foundation (Weeks 1-2)


// Files to create:
src/lib/data-sources/
├── base-source.ts // Abstract base class
├── free-tier.ts // Free public data sources
├── starter-tier.ts // Commercial data vendors
└── professional-tier.ts // Premium data sources

src/lib/mcp/
├── data-mcp-server.ts // MCP server for data enrichment
└── types.ts // MCP protocol types

src/lib/enrichment/
├── normalizer.ts // Normalize data to schema
├── deduplicator.ts // Entity resolution
└── scorer.ts // Priority scoring logic
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 11 (chunk 11/32)
